name: ExpatPortugal — Weekly Sunday Digest

parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 2500, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `You write the Sunday morning weekly digest for ExpatPortugal.guide — a newsletter for English-speaking expats in Portugal.

Week ending: ${$json.weekLabel}
Hot topics this week: ${$json.hotTopics}

This week's news articles (with links — include these as clickable links in the email):
${$json.articleLines}

Events that happened this past week:
${$json.pastLines || 'No events logged this week'}

Upcoming events:
${$json.upcomingLines || 'No upcoming events yet'}

Write a complete HTML email newsletter. Rules:
- Warm, friendly opening paragraph (2-3 sentences) — mention the season/weather, one cultural note about Portugal this time of year
- Section: "This week in Portugal" — list the news articles as clickable links (use the URLs provided). Group by topic if there are 3+ from the same category. 1 sentence of context per article max — just enough to make people want to click. Format each as: Emoji Title (link opens in new tab) — Source Name
- Section: "What happened this week" — brief mention of past events (if any)
- Section: "Coming up" — upcoming events as a clean list with date, name, city
- Section: "Hot topic this week" — 1 paragraph (4-5 sentences) about the most talked-about theme (${$json.hotTopics.split(',')[0]}) — what's happening, why expats should care, what to do about it
- Short sign-off (1 sentence, warm)

HTML rules:
- Return ONLY the HTML body content, starting with a <div>
- Use inline CSS only — no <style> tags
- Main container: max-width 600px, margin auto, font-family Arial sans-serif, color #1c1917
- Section headings: font-size 11px, text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing 0.1em, color #a8a29e, margin-bottom 8px
- Article links: color #c0381a, text-decoration none, font-weight 500
- Sections separated by a thin border (border-top: 1px solid #f0efe9) with padding 20px 0
- Footer: font-size 11px, color #a8a29e, text-align center, margin-top 32px
- All external links must have target="_blank" rel="noopener"` }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ subject: $json.subject, body: $json.html, status: 'scheduled', publish_date: new Date(new Date().setHours(8,0,0,0)).toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Schedule in Buttondown for 8am
nodes._comment: Workflow runs at 7am, schedules the email to send at 8am. Change status from 'scheduled' to 'draft' if you want to review before sending.

_comment: DIGEST CONTENTS: this week's news (with links), events that happened, upcoming events, hot topic deep-dive, warm sign-off. Runs 7am Sunday, lands in inboxes at 8am. Claude Haiku is used ONCE per week — cost approx €0.05 per send.
